title: Jih-tan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jih-tan''' was an [[Ebranite]] [[thildas]], or clan. As late as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era, the Jih-tan continued their feuding ways. Another clan with a similar outlook was the [[Rull]], who may have been their rivals. Most of the other Ebranite clans had learned to co-operate with one another by that time.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
